message:
fix(freshness): add RefreshIndicator to 3 cards (#6217 part 4) (#6261)

Continues #6217 from parts 1-3 (#6239, #6256, #6259). Adds the standard
RefreshIndicator to three more cards:

* GitOpsDrift — drift cache, header right
* HardwareHealthCard — replaced bespoke "Updated HH:MM:SS" footer with
  the standard component (gives the card a stale-data warning past 5
  minutes that the homemade footer didn't)
* DeploymentProgress — deployments cache, header right

3 cards remaining for parts 5+.
Refs #6217

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
